name: hdate

metadata.name: hdate
metadata.summary: Jewish/Hebrew date and Zmanim in native Python 2.7/3.x

documentation:
# py-libhdate

Jewish/Hebrew date and Zmanim in native python 3.x

Originally ported from libhdate, see <http://libhdate.sourceforge.net/> for more details (including license)

______________________________________________________________________

## Installation using pip:

```shell
$ pip install hdate
```

______________________________________________________________________

## Examples:

base code to provide times of the day in hebrew:

```python
>>> import hdate
>>> import datetime
>>> c = hdate.Location("פתח תקוה", 32.08707, 34.88747, "Asia/Jerusalem", 54)
>>> z = hdate.Zmanim(date=datetime.date(2016, 4, 18), location=c, hebrew=True)
>>> print(z)
עלות השחר - 04:52:00
זמן טלית ותפילין - 05:18:00
הנץ החמה - 06:08:00
סוף זמן ק"ש מג"א - 08:46:00
סוף זמן ק"ש גר"א - 09:23:00
סוף זמן תפילה מג"א - 10:04:00
סוף זמן תפילה גר"א - 10:28:00
חצות היום - 12:40:00
מנחה גדולה - 13:10:30
מנחה קטנה - 16:25:30
פלג המנחה - 17:50:45
שקיעה - 19:12:00
צאת הכוכבים - 19:38:00
חצות הלילה - 00:40:00
```

and in english:

```python
>>> z = hdate.Zmanim(date=datetime.date(2016, 4, 18), location=c, hebrew=False)
>>> print(z)
Alot HaShachar - 04:52:00
Talit & Tefilin's time - 05:18:00
Sunrise - 06:08:00
Shema EOT MG"A - 08:46:00
Shema EOT GR"A - 09:23:00
Tefila EOT MG"A - 10:04:00
Tefila EOT GR"A - 10:28:00
Midday - 12:40:00
Big Mincha - 13:10:30
Small Mincha - 16:25:30
Plag Mincha - 17:50:45
Sunset - 19:12:00
First stars - 19:38:00
Midnight - 00:40:00
```

______________________________________________________________________

to provide the full hebrew date:

```python
>>> h = hdate.HDate(datetime.date(2016, 4, 26), hebrew=True)
>>> print(h)
יום שלישי י"ח בניסן ה' תשע"ו ג' בעומר חול המועד פסח
```

and in english:

```python
>>> h = hdate.HDate(datetime.date(2016, 4, 18), hebrew=False)
>>> print(h)
Monday 10 Nisan 5776
```

modules.name: hdate.location
documentation: Location data for HDate - used by Zmanim.

classes.name: hdate.location.Location

methods.name: hdate.location.Location.__repr__
documentation: Return a representation of Location for programmatic use.
Define a geolocation for Zmanim calculations.

modules.name: hdate
documentation:
Jewish calendrical date and times for a given location.

HDate calculates and generates a representation either in English or Hebrew
of the Jewish calendrical date and times for a given location

modules.name: hdate.converters
documentation: Methods for going back and forth between various calendars.

functions.name: hdate.converters.get_chalakim
documentation: Return the number of total parts (chalakim).

functions.name: hdate.converters._days_from_3744
documentation: Return: Number of days since 3,1,3744.

functions.name: hdate.converters.get_size_of_hebrew_year
documentation: Return: total days in hebrew year.

functions.name: hdate.converters.gdate_to_jdn
documentation:
Compute Julian day from Gregorian day, month and year.

Algorithm from wikipedia's julian_day article.
Return: The julian day number

functions.name: hdate.converters.hdate_to_jdn
documentation:
Compute Julian day from Hebrew day, month and year.

Return: julian day number,
        1 of tishrey julians,
        1 of tishrey julians next year

functions.name: hdate.converters.jdn_to_gdate
documentation:
Convert from the Julian day to the Gregorian day.

Algorithm from 'Julian and Gregorian Day Numbers' by Peter Meyer.
Return: day, month, year

functions.name: hdate.converters.jdn_to_hdate
documentation: Convert from the Julian day to the Hebrew day.

variables.name: hdate.converters.PARTS_IN_MONTH
documentation: Fix for regular month

documentation: Pure Hebrew date class.

classes.name: hdate.hebrew_date.HebrewDate
documentation: Define a Hebrew date object.

modules.name: hdate.zmanim
documentation:
Jewish calendrical times for a given location.

HDate calculates and generates a representation either in English or Hebrew
of the Jewish calendrical times for a given location

classes.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the Zmanim object.

As the timezone is expected to be part of the location object, any
tzinfo passed along is discarded. Essentially making the datetime
object non-timezone aware.

The time zone information is appended to the date received based on the
location object. After which it is transformed to UTC for all internal
calculations.
pylint: disable=too-many-arguments, too-many-positional-arguments

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.__str__
documentation: Return a Unicode representation of Zmanim.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.__repr__
documentation: Return a representation of Zmanim for programmatic use.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.utc_zmanim
documentation: Return a dictionary of the zmanim in UTC time format.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.zmanim
documentation: Return a dictionary of the zmanim the object represents.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.candle_lighting
documentation: Return the time for candle lighting, or None if not applicable.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim._havdalah_datetime
documentation: Compute the havdalah time based on settings.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.havdalah
documentation:
Return the time for havdalah, or None if not applicable.

If havdalah_offset is 0, uses the time for three_stars. Otherwise,
adds the offset to the time of sunset and uses that.
If it's currently a multi-day YomTov, and the end of the stretch is
after today, the havdalah value is defined to be None (to avoid
misleading the user that melacha is permitted).

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.issur_melacha_in_effect
documentation: At the given time, return whether issur melacha is in effect.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.erev_shabbat_chag
documentation: At the given time, return whether erev shabbat or chag

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.motzei_shabbat_chag
documentation: At the given time, return whether motzei shabbat or chag

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.gday_of_year
documentation: Return the number of days since January 1 of the given year.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim._get_utc_sun_time_deg
documentation:
Return the times in minutes from 00:00 (utc) for a given sun altitude.

This is done for a given sun altitude in sunrise `deg` degrees
This function only works for altitudes sun really is.
If the sun never gets to this altitude, the returned sunset and sunrise
values will be negative. This can happen in low altitude when latitude
is nearing the poles in winter times, the sun never goes very high in
the sky there.

Algorithm from
http://www.srrb.noaa.gov/highlights/sunrise/calcdetails.html
The low accuracy solar position equations are used.
These routines are based on Jean Meeus's book Astronomical Algorithms.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim._datetime_to_minutes_offest
documentation: Return the time in minutes from 00:00 (utc) for a given time.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim._get_utc_time_of_transit
documentation: Return the time in minutes from 00:00 (utc) for a given sun altitude.

methods.name: hdate.zmanim.Zmanim.get_utc_sun_time_full
documentation: Return a list of Jewish times for the given location.

Return Jewish day times.

The Zmanim class returns times for the specified day ONLY. If you wish to
obtain times for the interval of a multi-day holiday for example, you need
to use Zmanim in conjunction with some of the iterative properties of
HDate. Also, Zmanim are reported regardless of the current time. So the
havdalah value is constant if the current time is before or after it.
The current time is only used to report the "issur_melacha_in_effect"
property.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.parasha
documentation: Return the upcoming parasha.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.holiday_description
documentation:
Return the holiday description.

In case none exists will return None.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.is_shabbat
documentation:
Return True if this date is Shabbat, specifically Saturday.

Returns False on Friday because the HDate object has no notion of time.
For more detailed nuance, use the Zmanim object.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.is_holiday
documentation: Return True if this date is a holiday (any kind).

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.is_yom_tov
documentation: Return True if this date is a Yom Tov.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.is_leap_year
documentation: Return True if this date's year is a leap year.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.holiday_type
documentation: Return the holiday type if exists.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.holiday_name
documentation: Return the holiday name which is good for programmatic use.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate._holiday_entries
documentation: Return the abstract holiday information from holidays table.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.short_kislev
documentation: Return whether this year has a short Kislev or not.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.long_cheshvan
documentation: Return whether this year has a long Cheshvan or not.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.dow
documentation: Return Hebrew day of week Sunday = 1, Saturday = 7.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.year_size
documentation: Return the size of the given Hebrew year.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.rosh_hashana_dow
documentation: Return the Hebrew day of week for Rosh Hashana.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.pesach_dow
documentation: Return the first day of week for Pesach.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.omer_day
documentation: Return the day of the Omer.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.daf_yomi_repr
documentation: Return a tuple of mesechta and daf.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.daf_yomi
documentation: Return a string representation of the daf yomi.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.next_day
documentation: Return the HDate for the next day.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.previous_day
documentation: Return the HDate for the previous day.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.upcoming_shabbat
documentation:
Return the HDate for either the upcoming or current Shabbat.

If it is currently Shabbat, returns the HDate of the Saturday.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.upcoming_shabbat_or_yom_tov
documentation:
Return the HDate for the upcoming or current Shabbat or Yom Tov.

If it is currently Shabbat, returns the HDate of the Saturday.
If it is currently Yom Tov, returns the HDate of the first day
(rather than "leil" Yom Tov). To access Leil Yom Tov, use
upcoming_shabbat_or_yom_tov.previous_day.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.first_day
documentation:
Return the first day of Yom Tov or Shabbat.

This is useful for three-day holidays, for example: it will return the
first in a string of Yom Tov + Shabbat.
If this HDate is Shabbat followed by no Yom Tov, returns the Saturday.
If this HDate is neither Yom Tov, nor Shabbat, this just returns
itself.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.last_day
documentation:
Return the last day of Yom Tov or Shabbat.

This is useful for three-day holidays, for example: it will return the
last in a string of Yom Tov + Shabbat.
If this HDate is Shabbat followed by no Yom Tov, returns the Saturday.
If this HDate is neither Yom Tov, nor Shabbat, this just returns
itself.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.get_holidays_for_year
documentation:
Get all the actual holiday days for a given HDate's year.

If specified, use the list of types to limit the holidays returned.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.upcoming_yom_tov
documentation:
Find the next upcoming yom tov (i.e. no-melacha holiday).

If it is currently the day of yom tov (irrespective of zmanim), returns
that yom tov.

methods.name: hdate.date.HDate.get_reading
documentation: Return number of hebrew parasha.

Hebrew date class.

Supports converting from Gregorian and Julian to Hebrew date.
pylint: disable=too-many-public-methods

modules.name: hdate.htables
documentation: Constant lookup tables for hdate modules.

functions.name: hdate.htables.year_is_after
documentation:
Return a lambda function.

Lambda checks that a given HDate object's hebrew year is after the
requested year.

functions.name: hdate.htables.year_is_before
documentation:
Return a lambda function.

Lambda checks that a given HDate object's hebrew year is before the
requested year.

functions.name: hdate.htables.move_if_not_on_dow
documentation:
Return a lambda function.

Lambda checks that either the original day does not fall on a given
weekday, or that the replacement day does fall on the expected weekday.

functions.name: hdate.htables.correct_adar
documentation:
Return a lambda function.

Lambda checks that the value of the month returned is correct depending on whether
it's a leap year.

functions.name: hdate.htables.not_rosh_chodesh
documentation: The 1st of Tishrei is not Rosh Chodesh.

functions.name: hdate.htables.legal_month_length
documentation:
Return a lambda function.

Lambda checks that the length for the provided month is legal

documentation: Helper method to get all the holiday descriptions.
